features: Apply when your skin is suffering with those stubborn breakouts and rough textures!
description: Product Description Restore & clear your skin with our Salicylic Acid Facial Serum. Packed with 2% Salicylic Acid, calming Aloe Vera and multitasking Niacinamide, our serum gently removes surface impurities and helps reduce the appearance of oil and blemishes. Apply when your skin is suffering with those stubborn breakouts and rough textures! Vegan Friendly. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Butylene Glycol, Sorbeth-30, Betaine, Oligopeptide-1, Nonapeptide-1, Hydrolyzed Rice Protein, Lavandula Hybrida Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Seed Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Allantoin, Panthenol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Carbomer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Xanthan Gum, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Disodium EDTA, Phenoxyethanol, Dipeptide Diaminobutyroyl Benzylamide Diacetate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Linalool. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Shake well before use. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. See more
